name: [GRV-API] Monthly SLA Compliance Monitor
message:
Monthly SLA compliance at risk for grv-api service.

Service: {{service}}
Monthly Availability: {{value}}%
SLA Target: {{.Env.MONTHLY_SLA_THRESHOLD | default "99.9"}}%
Environment: {{env}}
Days Remaining in Month: {{#subtract 30 {{#now 'd'}}}}{{.}} days{{/subtract}}

SLA Compliance Status:
- Current Monthly Performance: {{value}}%
- Required Minimum: {{.Env.MONTHLY_SLA_THRESHOLD | default "99.9"}}%
- Risk Level: {{#if (lt value 99.5)}}HIGH{{else if (lt value 99.8)}}MEDIUM{{else}}LOW{{/if}}

Business Impact:
- Potential SLA breach financial penalties
- Customer satisfaction impact
- Service level agreement violations

Required Actions:
1. Review monthly performance trends
2. Identify root causes of availability issues
3. Implement performance improvements
4. Consider compensation for affected customers
5. Update stakeholders on SLA status

SLA Report: https://app.datadoghq.com/apm/services/grv-api?env=prod&view=performance

options.escalation_message: Monthly SLA at high risk of breach. Executive attention required.
